annotation_policy: Blind downstream annotation from source O&M text only. Do not consult model outputs or metric reports.
metric_boundary: Primary paper metrics belong to workflow-centric retrieval and suffix ranking. Graph-construction metrics remain under experiments/metrics and should not be conflated with downstream ranking scores.

samples.query: Front manifold face shows coolant odor and wetness after access removal. Which workflow suffix should be retrieved next?
samples.notes: Main downstream task: evidence-grounded workflow retrieval from complaint and local boundary evidence.

samples.query: Rank the most plausible repair-and-verify suffix after the inspection prefix.

candidate_suffixes.rationale: Continue with measurement, repair confirmation, and release verification.
Stop after shallow reinspection without repair closure.

samples.notes: Auxiliary downstream task: rank competing repair suffixes rather than only predict the next single step.
